# Rasengan.js
> A modern, high-performance React meta-framework built on Vite and react-router v7. Supports SSR, SSG, SPA, file-based routing, config-based routing, MDX, and deployment adapters.

## Core Concepts

- [Introduction](https://rasengan.dev/docs/getting-started/introduction): Overview of Rasengan.js and its features
- [Installation](https://rasengan.dev/docs/getting-started/installation): Create a new project with `npx create-rasengan@latest` or manual setup
- [Project Structure](https://rasengan.dev/docs/getting-started/project-structure): Default layout of a Rasengan.js project

## Routing

- [Base Concepts](https://rasengan.dev/docs/routing/base-concepts): How routing works in Rasengan.js
- [Router Configuration](https://rasengan.dev/docs/routing/router-config): Config-based routing with `defineRouter()`
- [Routes & Pages](https://rasengan.dev/docs/routing/routes): Page components, layouts, and the `RouterComponent` class
- [Layouts](https://rasengan.dev/docs/routing/layouts): Layout components for shared UI around pages
- [File-based Routing](https://rasengan.dev/docs/routing/file-based-routing): Automatic routing via `src/app/_routes/` directory
- [Linking & Navigation](https://rasengan.dev/docs/routing/linking-and-navigation): Client-side navigation with `Link` and `NavLink`
- [Dynamic Routes](https://rasengan.dev/docs/routing/dynamic-routes): Dynamic segments `[param]`, optional `[_param]`, route groups `(group)`
- [Error Handling](https://rasengan.dev/docs/routing/error-handling): Error boundaries and 404 handling
- [Redirecting](https://rasengan.dev/docs/routing/redirecting): Defining redirects in config or from loaders

## Rendering

- [SSR](https://rasengan.dev/docs/rendering/ssr): Server-Side Rendering with streaming
- [CSR](https://rasengan.dev/docs/rendering/csr): Client-Side Rendering (SPA mode)
- [Prerendering](https://rasengan.dev/docs/rendering/prerendering): Static Site Generation (SSG) with `prerender: true`

## Styling

- [CSS Modules](https://rasengan.dev/docs/styling/css-modules): Component-scoped CSS
- [Tailwind CSS](https://rasengan.dev/docs/styling/tailwindcss): Tailwind CSS integration
- [Preprocessors](https://rasengan.dev/docs/styling/preprocessors): Sass, Less, Stylus support

## Optimizing

- [Images](https://rasengan.dev/docs/optimizing/images): Image optimization with `@rasenganjs/image`
- [Metadata](https://rasengan.dev/docs/optimizing/metadata): Title, description, Open Graph, Twitter cards
- [Static Assets](https://rasengan.dev/docs/optimizing/static-assets): Public directory and asset handling
- [React Compiler](https://rasengan.dev/docs/optimizing/react-compiler): Sage Mode with React Compiler

## Configuring

- [TypeScript](https://rasengan.dev/docs/configuring/typescript): TypeScript setup
- [Environment Variables](https://rasengan.dev/docs/configuring/environment-variables): Managing env vars
- [Module Aliases](https://rasengan.dev/docs/configuring/modules-aliases): Path aliases like `@/`

## Deploying

- [Vercel](https://rasengan.dev/docs/deploying/vercel): Deploy to Vercel with `@rasenganjs/vercel`
- [Node](https://rasengan.dev/docs/deploying/node): Self-host with `@rasenganjs/serve`

## API Reference

### Components
- [Link](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/components/Link): Client-side navigation component
- [NavLink](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/components/NavLink): Link with active state
- [Outlet](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/components/Outlet): Renders child route content
- [Component](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/components/Component): Root app component wrapper
- [Template](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/components/Template): HTML document shell with Head, Body, Script
- [Layout](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/components/Layout): Layout component pattern
- [Page](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/components/Page): Page component pattern
- [Router](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/components/Router): Router component class
- [ScrollRestoration](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/components/ScrollRestoration): Scroll position management

### Functions
- [defineConfig](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/functions/defineConfig): Framework configuration
- [defineRouter](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/functions/defineRouter): Config-based router definition
- [defineRoutesGroup](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/functions/defineRoutesGroup): Group routes under a path prefix
- [defineStaticPaths](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/functions/defineStaticPaths): SSG static path generation
- [renderApp](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/functions/renderApp): Client entry point for hydration

### Conventions
- [Layout File Convention](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/conventions/layout-component): `layout.tsx` naming
- [Page File Convention](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/conventions/page-component): `*.page.tsx` naming
- [Router File Convention](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/conventions/router-component): `app.router.ts` naming

### CLI
- [create-rasengan CLI](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/create-rasengan-cli): Project scaffolding tool
- [rasengan CLI](https://rasengan.dev/docs/api-reference/rasengan-cli): Dev server and build commands

## Packages

- [@rasenganjs/create-rasengan](https://rasengan.dev/packages/create-rasengan): Project scaffolding
- [@rasenganjs/kurama](https://rasengan.dev/packages/kurama): Zustand-like state management
- [@rasenganjs/mdx](https://rasengan.dev/packages/mdx): MDX content support
- [@rasenganjs/serve](https://rasengan.dev/packages/serve): Production server
- [@rasenganjs/vercel](https://rasengan.dev/packages/vercel): Vercel deployment adapter
- [@rasenganjs/image](https://rasengan.dev/packages/image): Optimized Image component
- [@rasenganjs/theme](https://rasengan.dev/packages/theme): Light/dark/system theme
- [@rasenganjs/i18n](https://rasengan.dev/packages/i18n): Internationalization
- [@rasenganjs/kage-demo](https://rasengan.dev/packages/kage-demo): Interactive feature tours

## Quick Reference

### AppConfig
```ts
interface AppConfig {
  ssr?: boolean;                                   // default: true
  prerender?: boolean | { routes: string[] };      // SSG mode
  sageMode?: { reactCompiler?: boolean | { compilationMode: 'annotation' } };
  server?: { development?: { port?: number; open?: boolean } };
  vite?: ViteConfig;                               // partial Vite overrides
  redirects?: () => Promise<Redirect[]>;            // static redirect rules
}
```

### RouterComponent properties
| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| `layout` | `LayoutComponent \| RouteNode` | Layout component for the router |
| `routers` | `RouterComponent[]` | Nested sub-routers |
| `pages` | `PageComponent[] \| RouteNode[]` | Page components |
| `loaderComponent` | `FunctionComponent` | Loading fallback |
| `notFoundComponent` | `FunctionComponent` | 404 component |
| `useParentLayout` | `boolean` | Inherit parent layout |

### Metadata
```ts
type Metadata = {
  title?: string;
  description?: string;
  openGraph?: { type?, title?, description?, url, image, width?, height? };
  twitter?: { card: 'summary_large_image'|'summary', image, title, description?, creator?, site? };
  links?: Array<{ rel, type?, sizes?, href }>;
  metaTags?: Array<{ name?, property?, content }>;
};
```

### File-based routing conventions
| File pattern | Route segment |
|-------------|---------------|
| `layout.tsx` | Layout for the route group |
| `*.page.tsx` | Page component |
| `[param].page.tsx` | Dynamic segment `:param` |
| `[_param].page.tsx` | Optional dynamic `:param?` |
| `(group)/` | Route group (ignored in path) |
| `_name/` | Optional static segment `name?` |

### Required project files
- `rasengan.config.js` — Framework config using `defineConfig()`
- `src/main.{jsx,tsx}` — Root App component (default export, receives `AppProps`)
- `src/template.{jsx,tsx}` — HTML template (default export, receives `TemplateProps`)
- `src/app/app.router.{js,ts}` — Router definition (default export, `RouterComponent`)
- `src/index.{js,ts}` — Entry point calling `renderApp(App, AppRouter?)`
- `src/app/_routes/` — File-based route definitions (optional)

### Entry point pattern
```ts
import { renderApp } from 'rasengan/client';
import App from './main';

renderApp(App, AppRouter); // or renderApp(App) for config-based
renderApp(App, AppRouter, { reactStrictMode: true }); // with strict mode
```

### Router definition (config-based)
```ts
import { RouterComponent, defineRouter } from 'rasengan';
import Home from './home.page';

class AppRouter extends RouterComponent {}

export default defineRouter({
  pages: [Home],
  layout: AppLayout,
  notFoundComponent: NotFound,
})(AppRouter);
```

### Router definition (file-based)
```ts
import { RouterComponent, defineRouter } from 'rasengan';
import Router from 'virtual:rasengan/router';

class AppRouter extends RouterComponent {}

export default defineRouter({ imports: [Router] })(AppRouter);
```

### Page component
```ts
import { PageComponent } from 'rasengan';

const Home: PageComponent = () => <main>Home</main>;
Home.path = '/';
Home.metadata = { title: 'Home', description: 'Home page' };
export default Home;
```

### Layout component
```ts
import { Outlet, LayoutComponent } from 'rasengan';

const AppLayout: LayoutComponent = () => <div><Outlet /></div>;
AppLayout.path = '/';
export default AppLayout;
```

### CLI commands
```bash
rasengan dev    # Start development server (port 5320)
rasengan build  # Build for production
rasengan-serve ./dist  # Serve production build
```

### Loader function
```ts
import { LoaderFunction } from 'rasengan';

export const loader: LoaderFunction = async ({ params, request }) => {
  const data = await fetchData(params.id);
  return { props: { data }, meta: { title: 'Page Title' } };
};
```

### Build output structure
```
dist/
  client/        # Client bundle + manifest.json
    assets/      # JS, CSS, config.json
    .vite/       # Vite manifest
  server/        # SSR server bundle
static/          # Pre-rendered HTML (SSG)
```

## Architecture

Rasengan.js is built on three pillars:
- **Vite** for fast development (HMR) and optimized builds
- **React Router v7** for client/server routing with loaders and actions
- **Express** for the dev and production SSR server

Rendering modes:
| Mode | Config | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| SSR | `ssr: true` (default) | Server renders HTML, client hydrates |
| SPA | `ssr: false` | Client-side only rendering |
| SSG | `prerender: true` | Pre-renders HTML at build time |

## Ecosystem packages
- **State management**: `@rasenganjs/kurama` — Zustand-inspired stores
- **MDX**: `@rasenganjs/mdx` — MDX transform + components (MDXRenderer, TableOfContents, CodeBlock)
- **Images**: `@rasenganjs/image` — Optimized lazy images with blur/wave placeholders
- **Theme**: `@rasenganjs/theme` — Light/dark/system with localStorage persistence
- **i18n**: `@rasenganjs/i18n` — Locale management with URL-based detection
- **Deployment**: `@rasenganjs/vercel` (Vercel adapter), `@rasenganjs/serve` (Node server)
